_comment: Generated by secured-claude entrypoint at first run. PreToolUse hook (ADR-0002) POSTs the tool intent to the host broker for Cerbos gating. PostToolUse hook (ADR-0046) POSTs Read tool results to the broker /transform route for secret redaction before the LLM sees the content — only fires when SECURED_CLAUDE_REDACT_LEVEL is set to secrets / aggressive.
